hotspot.title: MD ROOM — SMART EXECUTIVE EXPERIENCE
hotspot.description: Designed as the intelligent control hub of the executive workspace, the MD Room integrates premium smart automation to create a seamless and immersive office experience. Featured Systems • 2 Nos — TS81 8M S S Black 8M Square Modular Plate | 8 Smart Points | 2 x 6A Sockets • 1 No — TS81 4M Black 4M Modular Plate | 8 Smart Points • TS21 Modular Touch Interface • TF11 Smart Fan Controller • Integrated with 4M Custom Smart Boards Together, these automation elements enhance executive comfort, interactive control, and contemporary workspace ambience while allowing visitors and professionals to experience intelligent architectural integration in a real-world environment.

hotspot.title: CLIMATE CONTROL ZONE — SMART POWER INTERFACE
hotspot.description:
Designed to support seamless smart utility access for climate control systems while maintaining a clean and minimal architectural integration within the immersive workspace environment. The compact smart power interface enhances functionality without interrupting the refined interior aesthetics.
Featured Systems
• Smart Plug Point for AC With 2M Custom Board
Integrated to provide convenient and efficient appliance connectivity while complementing the contemporary smart interior experience.

hotspot.title: SMARTEEFI — SMART INTERACTION WALL
hotspot.description: Designed as a dedicated smart interaction feature within the experience center, the illuminated automation wall transforms everyday control systems into a refined architectural experience. Featured Systems • 2 Nos — Modular Touch 8 Port TS81 With Custom 8M Boards • 2 Nos — TF11 Modular Touch Fan Controllers With 4M Custom Boards • 2 Nos — TS11 Modular Touch 16A With 4M Custom Boards Positioned within the visitor engagement zone, the integrated control ecosystem allows builders, architects, engineers, and clients to experience intelligent interaction technology within a sophisticated contemporary environment. The illuminated feature backdrop and integrated smart control systems together create a visually immersive technology experience that blends architectural aesthetics with intelligent living.

hotspot.title: SOFA LOUNGE — SMART CONVENIENCE EXPERIENCE
hotspot.description:
Thoughtfully positioned beside the visitor seating area, the integrated touch interface and fast charging system create a seamless everyday interaction experience within the immersive workspace environment. The refined smart utility setup enhances comfort, accessibility, and modern convenience while allowing guests to experience intelligent interior integration in a natural and functional setting.
Featured Systems
• Fast USB Charging Interface • TS21 Modular Touch 2 Port, 6A With 4M Custom Board
• TS21 Modular Touch 2 Port, 6A With 2M Custom Board
Designed to encourage subtle real-world interaction through comfort-driven smart utility access within the contemporary lounge environment.

hotspot.title: SOFA LOUNGE — SMART CONVENIENCE POINT
hotspot.description:
Thoughtfully positioned beside the visitor seating area, the integrated touch interface and fast charging system create a seamless everyday interaction experience within the immersive workspace environment. The refined smart utility setup enhances comfort, accessibility, and modern convenience while allowing guests to experience intelligent interior integration in a natural and functional setting.
Featured Systems
• Fast USB Charging Interface • TS21 Modular Touch 2 Port, 6A With 4M Custom Board
• TS21 Modular Touch 2 Port, 6A With 2M Custom Board
Designed to encourage subtle real-world interaction through comfort-driven smart utility access within the contemporary lounge environment.

hotspot.title: TV DISPLAY ZONE — SMART MEDIA CONNECTIVITY
hotspot.description: Integrated within the media display environment, the smart utility and power interface is designed to support seamless connectivity for entertainment and presentation appliances while maintaining a clean and organized contemporary interior aesthetic. The touch-enabled control system enhances convenience and accessibility within the immersive workspace experience. Featured Systems • 2 Smart Plug Points for TV & Media Appliances With 4M Custom Board • TS21 Modular Touch 2 Port, 6A With 2M Custom Board Designed to provide intuitive access to media connectivity and smart utility control while complementing the refined technology-driven ambience of the experience center.

hotspot.title: CLIMATE CONTROL ZONE — SMART POWER INTERFACE
hotspot.description:
Designed to support seamless smart utility access for climate control systems while maintaining a clean and minimal architectural integration within the immersive workspace environment. The compact smart power interface enhances functionality without interrupting the refined interior aesthetics.
Featured Systems
• Smart Plug Point for AC With 2M Custom Board
Integrated to provide convenient and efficient appliance connectivity while complementing the contemporary smart interior experience.

hotspot.title: SMART INTERACTION WALL
hotspot.description: Designed as a dedicated smart interaction feature within the experience center, the illuminated automation wall transforms everyday control systems into a refined architectural experience. Featured Systems • 2 Nos — Modular Touch 8 Port TS81 With Custom 8M Boards • 2 Nos — TF11 Modular Touch Fan Controllers With 4M Custom Boards • 2 Nos — TS11 Modular Touch 16A With 4M Custom Boards Positioned within the visitor engagement zone, the integrated control ecosystem allows builders, architects, engineers, and clients to experience intelligent interaction technology within a sophisticated contemporary environment. The illuminated feature backdrop and integrated smart control systems together create a visually immersive technology experience that blends architectural aesthetics with intelligent living.

hotspot.description: Integrated within the media display environment, the smart utility and power interface is designed to support seamless connectivity for entertainment and presentation appliances while maintaining a clean and organized contemporary interior aesthetic. The touch-enabled control system enhances convenience and accessibility within the immersive workspace experience. Featured Systems • 2 Smart Plug Points for TV & Media Appliances With 4M Custom Board • TS21 Modular Touch 2 Port, 6A With 2M Custom Board Designed to provide intuitive access to media connectivity and smart utility control while complementing the refined technology-driven ambience of the experience center.
